events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes worn sheave grooves where the belt is riding low (ID - inside diameter). This is a defective condition. Worn sheave grooves cause belts to ride low, reducing contact area, causing premature belt wear, slippage, and reduced power transmission efficiency. This is out of tolerance per manufacturer guides.

Let me construct the JSON response.
